concepts.description: The total mental effort imposed on working memory during a task; encompasses intrinsic, extraneous, and germane demands.
Complex system-level behaviour that arises from simple local rules without central coordination.
The value of the next-best alternative foregone when a choice is made; the hidden price of any decision.
Exponential growth produced by reinvesting returns so that each period's gain becomes the base for the next.
A decision strategy of accepting the first option that meets a minimum threshold rather than optimising for the best possible outcome.
